case_title: SECRET AGENT VENTURES LLC VS. JOHN ME STEVENSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRET AGENT VENTURES LLC
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTFF
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRET AGENT VENTURES LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN ME

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SECRET AGENT VENTURES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN ME THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3490 20TH STREET #200, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRET AGENT VENTURES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN ME
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN ME
POS OF NTC OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRET AGENT VENTURES LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN ME

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRET AGENT VENTURES LLC SERVED JUN-06-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN ME

NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF KOZUBAL, JOANNA ON JUL-09-2018 THROUGH JUL-18-2018 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRET AGENT VENTURES LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRET AGENT VENTURES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN ME DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
